projectDescription: A Docker Compose wrapper that automatically synchronises NetBox IP prefix data with the RIPE database, with built-in S3 backups and custom NETNAME support.
keyFeatures: Automatic synchronisation of NetBox prefixes to RIPE DB (INETNUM/INET6NUM objects)
Docker Compose deployment with zero-configuration Minio S3 backup storage
Custom NETNAME support via NetBox custom fields
HTTP Basic Auth protected backup browser UI
Support for RIPE API key authentication with rotation script
Jinja-style JSON template system for RIPE object attributes
Overlap detection and resolution for INET(6)NUM objects
Email reporting for RIPE DB changes
IPv4 and IPv6 prefix support with configurable smallest-prefix limits
ISO 3166 country code auto-resolution from NetBox site regions
publicApiSurface: POST /update — Accepts NetBox webhook payloads to create/update/delete RIPE objects
GET /backups — Basic-auth protected list of backup files
GET /backup/<name> — Basic-auth protected retrieval of a specific backup file
Environment: UI_USER, UI_PASSWORD, UPDATE_TOKEN, NETBOX_URL, NETBOX_TOKEN
Environment: S3_BACKUP, S3_ENDPOINT_URL, S3_ACCESS_KEY, S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, S3_BUCKET
Script: update-ripe-key.sh — Interactive RIPE API credential rotation with backup
